title: Every Ore and More
description: This Mod adds Tools and Armor for Amethyst, Lapis and Emerald. It also adds Tools for Chainmail, as well as making it craftable
body:
# Every Ore and More This mod adds Tools and Armor for Lapis, Amethyst and Emerald.
Other blocks and items are planned (including as well as Chainmail Tools and Copper and Coal items), but they will be added in a future update

### Credits: Logo made with [Font generator](https://www.textstudio.com/)
